tasks.instruction: Enable spam call blocking in the China Unicom Security Manager section of the Unicom app
rubrics: Wait for the advertisement to finish playing
Enter the spam call blocking function
Check and set up the spam call module
human_reference_operations: Click the Unicom app icon to launch the application
Wait 8 seconds for the startup advertisement to finish playing
If a second pop-up advertisement appears, click the × in the upper right corner to close it
Click the 'Services' button in the lower left corner of the screen
Scroll down the page to view more services
Find 'Unicom Security Manager' in the featured services area
Click 'Unicom Security Manager' to enter
Find the 'Spam Call Blocking' function on the Security Manager page
Click 'Spam Call Blocking' to enter settings
Check if there is a checkmark in the upper right corner of the 'Spam Call Module'
If the spam call module is not selected (no checkmark in the upper right corner), click to select the module
Click the 'Save Settings' button to confirm the configuration
Confirm that the settings have been successfully saved

tasks.instruction: Retrieve the number of blocked calls and marketing SMS messages in the 'China Unicom Security Manager' module under the 'Services' section of the China Unicom app
rubrics: Opened the China Unicom app and logged in successfully
Located and entered the 'China Unicom Security Manager' module
Found and recorded the 'Blocked Calls' count
Found and recorded the 'Marketing SMS Blocked' count
human_reference_operations: Launch the China Unicom app
Enter login credentials and tap 'Login'
Tap the 'Services' tab in the bottom navigation bar
Scroll down in the 'Services Hall' to locate 'China Unicom Security Manager'. If not found immediately, continue scrolling rather than repeating previous actions.
In the Security Manager interface, locate the 'Call Protection' section
Note down the number displayed next to 'Blocked Calls'
Scroll to find the 'SMS Protection' section
Note down the number displayed next to 'Marketing SMS Blocked'
